insight_events.title: Operating margin decelerating
insight_events.summary: Operating margin growth moved from -2.0% to +79.5% YoY for two consecutive quarters. Trailing-twelve-month growth confirms the same direction. Source: SEC XBRL quarterly filings.
insight_events.why_it_matters: Negative evidence. May change earnings power, cash generation, or the valuation range.
insight_events.recommended_follow_up: Compare this development with the thesis, falsifiers, and valuation assumptions.

insight_events.title: Net income accelerating
insight_events.summary: Net income growth moved from -102.1% to +126.6% YoY in the latest quarter. Trailing-twelve-month growth does not yet confirm. Source: SEC XBRL quarterly filings.
insight_events.why_it_matters: Positive evidence. May change earnings power, cash generation, or the valuation range.
insight_events.recommended_follow_up: Compare this development with the thesis, falsifiers, and valuation assumptions.

insight_events.title: CrowdStrike vs. Snowflake: Which Technology Stock Is a Better Buy in 2026?
insight_events.summary: CrowdStrike and Snowflake are compared as AI-driven enterprise software leaders. CrowdStrike offers cloud-native cybersecurity with a recurring subscription model, reporting ~21.7% revenue growth and near-profitability. Snowflake provides an AI Data Cloud platform with a consumption-based model, showing ~29.2% revenue...
insight_events.why_it_matters: May alter the timing or probability of a near-term catalyst.
insight_events.recommended_follow_up: Open the primary evidence, validate the ticker match, and record any thesis disagreement.

latest.title: CrowdStrike vs. Snowflake: Which Technology Stock Is a Better Buy in 2026?
latest.summary: CrowdStrike and Snowflake are compared as AI-driven enterprise software leaders. CrowdStrike offers cloud-native cybersecurity with a recurring subscription model, reporting ~21.7% revenue growth and near-profitability. Snowflake provides an AI Data Cloud platform with a consumption-based model, showing ~29.2% revenue.

top_claims.claim: Operating margin growth moved from -2.0% to +79.5% YoY for two consecutive quarters. Trailing-twelve-month growth confirms the same direction. Source: SEC XBRL quarterly filings.
Net income growth moved from -102.1% to +126.6% YoY in the latest quarter. Trailing-twelve-month growth does not yet confirm. Source: SEC XBRL quarterly filings.

The outperformers were concentrated in infrastructure, data platform, and security: Palantir (PLTR), Cloudflare (NET), MongoDB (MDB), Crowdstrike (CRWD), Snowflake (SNOW), Zscaler (ZS), and Twilio (TWLO).
For FFIV, we believe the best comparison is CrowdStrike (CRWD), a cybersecurity company.
